original_image_tags: The document is the reverse side of a typewritten page. The text from the front side is faintly visible in reverse through the thin paper. A large, irregular black shape obscures the bottom left corner. A small, black, circular punch hole or mark is visible near the bottom right.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten government document page with a red "TRANSMITTED" stamp and date/time mark near the top, plus faint reversed text visible near the bottom.*
